Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
